name: Masked Diffusion Language Models are Strong and Steerable Text-Based World Models for Agentic RL

description: arXiv:2607.16204v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent growth in reinforcement learning (RL) has surfaced a need for diverse, specialized training environments. Hand-curated environments with fixed task and reward difficulties become ineffective signals as model performance improves, and sparse rewards over long horizons induce mode collapse on specific workflows or tool structures. author: Darshan Deshpande
